title: Supply Line Crisis
description: Aberdeen is slowly starving. The trade routes to Larton have been cut off by goblin activity at Kazer-Dun, and the town's warehouses stand empty. Mayor Bjorn desperately needs someone to either clear the goblin threat or find an alternative supply route through the dangerous swamplands.

objectives.description: Learn about Aberdeen's supply crisis from Mayor Bjorn
Investigate the blocked trade route near Kazer-Dun
Clear the goblin blockade OR find the hidden swamp path to Larton

choices.description: Defeat the goblin scouts blocking the road
Discover the old smuggler's route through the swamp

objectives.description: Reach Larton and speak with the Trade Master about resuming supplies

notes: This quest establishes the connection between Aberdeen and Larton, and introduces the Kazer-Dun goblin threat. The choice allows players to either fight through or find a sneaky alternative.
